prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-NPT-FT28TSNSWRGAS-2PC Product Type: SWORD Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Full Tang 28" Tanto Style Replica Ninja Sword with Round Guard and Sheath Description: The blade includes seven silver-colored characters near the guard to give it an authentic look and features an oval guard and a pommel with lanyard hole. This solid single piece of 440 stainless steel gives you a durable, sharp blade.

The nylon webbing wrapped handle provides a secure, comfortable grip, so you will not lose hold of your sword even in the fiercest battle.

Not only is this sword great for defending yourself from ninjas, it can also be used as a machete. Blaze a trail in the forest or keep those weeds around your yard at bay.

Whatever the occasion, make sure you are always at the ready with this ninja sword. Search Terms: cosplay samurai blade sword ninja Features: - Full Tang Tanto Style Blade - 440 Stainless Steel Construction - Length: Sword 28"; Blade 19.5" - Sheath Secures Sword with Nylon Strap - Shoulder Strap on Sheath === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 28" Tanto Style Ninja Sword with Sheath
